decision: Use local registries and model constructors inside internal/domain/users to remove hard-coded branching while preserving existing service/repository boundaries.
reason: The task scope is limited to the users domain package and tests; registry/spec helpers provide the smallest OCP-aligned change without widening interfaces or route behavior.
impact: New transaction rules, profile-field rules, and financial snapshot mappings can be extended from centralized definitions instead of editing multiple service branches.
